g.text: IGN + INJ OUTPUTS: SEE S2 PAGE 1
B17 CAN_HI CAN Bus High 22AWG TP
B18 CAN_LO CAN Bus Low 22AWG TP
CAN BUS: SEE SECTION 11 FOR FULL NETWORK
NOTE: Cut list shows A14 — conflicts with TPS1. Verify pin.
WIRE PIN FUNCTION AWG COLOR LEN NOTES
#4a A01 ETB Motor 2 18 BRN 4.6ft Pin A -> OUT_HB2
#4b A18 ETB Motor 1 18 YEL 4.6ft Pin B -> OUT_HB1
#4c A14 ETB TPS1 Sig 22 DK GRN 4.6ft Pin C -> AV1
#4d A17 ETB TPS2 Sig 22 PPL 4.6ft Pin D -> AV4
#4e A02 ETB 5V Ref 22 GRY 4.6ft Pin E -> SEN_5V0_A
#4f B15 ETB Sig GND 22 BLK 4.6ft Pin F -> SEN_0V_A
#109 B03 Intake Air Temp 22 TAN 4.6ft NTC
#102 A14 Oil Pressure 22 VIO 4.6ft PIN CONFLICT?
#62 B17/18 CAN Bus Network 22 WHT/GRN 3.5ft TWISTED PAIR
- ETB: Single wire #4 replaced with 6 wires (#4a-#4f)
- ETB pins match GM 12605109 6-pin connector exactly
- Pin A = Motor 2 (HB2), Pin B = Motor 1 (HB1)
- Pin C = TPS1 (AV1), Pin D = TPS2 (AV4)
- Pin E = 5V Ref (SEN_5V0_A), Pin F = Sig GND (SEN_0V_A)
- Crank, Cam, Knock sensors use 2-conductor shielded cable
- Shield drain wires connect to SENSOR GROUND (B15/B16)
- Shield drain NEVER connects to chassis ground (G-01)
- Per Motec M130 wiring guidelines for EMI rejection
Wire #102 (Oil Pressure) assigned to A14 in cut list,
but A14 is also used by ETB TPS1 (#4c). Cannot share.
Recommend: Oil Pressure -> A25 (AV5, currently spare).
ACTION: Verify and update cut list before build.
All sensor ground returns go to M130 B15 (SEN_0V_A) or B16 (SEN_0V_B).
This is the star-ground architecture — NOT to chassis ground (G-01).
- All NTC temperature sensor returns (IAT, CLT, Oil Temp)
- MAP sensor ground, Fuel pressure ground, Oil pressure ground
DWG: NKW-K5-02-2 | REV: v2 | 2026-04-04 | MOTEC M130 GPR-LS3
17 wires (6 ETB + 11 sensors) | 4 shielded cables | 1 pin conflict flagged
